project.name: frappe-desk-ui
project.description: Frontend desktop UI and components for the Rust ERPNext rewrite.

llm_context.architecture_notes: This workspace contains the frontend application and component library compiled to WASM. It utilizes Dioxus for web-based reactive rendering, dynamic form interpreters, ListViews, widgets, dashboard builders, and real-time SSE handlers.

coding_standards.standard: No placeholder blocks or `todo!` stubs are permitted.
Utilize specific data typing and Dioxus signal primitives for reactive state management.
